title: Specialized Information and Referral * Offender/Ex-Offender Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Specialized Information and Referral * Offender/Ex-Offender Issues 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Assistive Technology Issues Blindness Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Deafness Disabilities Issues Down Syndrome Mental Health Issues Older Adult/Aging Issues Immigration Issues Abused Lesbians/Gay Individuals Abused Transgender Individuals LGBTQ2+ Issues Transgender Individuals Offender/Ex-Offender Issues Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY COMMUNITY ACTION REENTRY SERVICES EX-OFFENDER RESOURCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A resource center supporting individuals transitioning from incarceration, those on probation or parole, and others affected by the criminal justice system. Offers weekly legal clinics for civil matters, help with health insurance applications, and classes on parenting, personal finance, tenant readiness, and motivation. Provides consultations, information, and referrals for people and families impacted by incarceration. A computer lab is available for tutoring, GED preparation, job searches, and other needs. 2085 Commercial Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Current or past involvement with criminal justice system. Preference given to those currently on parole supervision and recently released from incarceration. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (971) 332-5332 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON CURE SUPPORT FOR FAMILIES OF INCARCERATED INDIVIDUALS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers monthly support groups and orientations for families with incarcerated members to help them understand the incarceration process and its impact on family life. 7805 SW 40th Avenue Portland, OR 97280 Eligibility: Adult family members and friends of incarcerated individuals Hours: Varies by program Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY EX-OFFENDER RESOURCE PROGRAM OREGON CURE SUPPORT FOR FAMILIES OF INCARCERATED INDIVIDUALS
